Advantage: When drawing attack modifiers, draw two cards and apply the better one.
Disadvantage: When drawing attack modifiers, draw two cards and apply the worse one.
Poison: If a figure is poisoned, all attacks targeting them gain +1 Attack. Any Heal applied to a poisoned figure removes the poison instead of healing.
Wound: At the start of the afflicted figure's turn, they suffer 1 damage.
Muddle: The afflicted figure gains Disadvantage on all of their attacks. Ends at the end of their next turn.
Immobilize: The afflicted figure cannot perform Move abilities. Ends at the end of their next turn.
Disarm: The afflicted figure cannot perform Attack abilities. Ends at the end of their next turn.
Stun: The afflicted figure cannot perform any abilities or use items. Ends at the end of their next turn.
Invisible: The afflicted figure cannot be targeted by attacks or targeted abilities by enemies. Ends at the end of their next turn.
Strengthen: The afflicted figure gains Advantage on all of their attacks. Ends at the end of their next turn.
Bless: Adds one x2 modifier card to the afflicted figure's attack modifier deck.
Curse: Adds one Null (x0) modifier card to the afflicted figure's attack modifier deck.
Pierce: Any attack with Pierce X ignores up to X points of the defender's Shield.
Shield: When a figure is attacked, reduce the damage taken by their total Shield value.
Retaliate: After an attack is resolved, the attacker suffers the Retaliate value in damage, provided they are within the listed range.
Ward: The next time this figure would suffer damage, they suffer half the damage (rounded down) instead, and the Ward condition is removed.
Brittle: The next time this figure would suffer damage from an attack, they suffer double the damage instead, and the Brittle condition is removed.
Bane: At the end of the afflicted figure's next turn, they suffer 10 damage and the Bane condition is removed.
Impair: The afflicted figure cannot benefit from any items.
Regenerate: At the start of the afflicted figure's turn, they perform a 'Heal 1, Self'. Removed if the figure is damaged.
Push: Force a target to move X hexes further away from the pushing figure.
Pull: Force a target to move X hexes closer to the pulling figure.
